title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 27 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 27 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 27 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 27/02/2024
DCE iron ore futures rose largely today. the main contract I2405 closed 897.5. an increase of 1.24% throughoutthe day.Some traders adopt separate quotations; Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchased on demand.
